[Home](./index.md) &gt; [@empathyco/x-components](./x-components.md) &gt; [Facets](./x-components.facets.md) &gt; [renderableFacets](./x-components.facets.renderablefacets.md)

## Facets.renderableFacets property

Discriminates the facets rendered by this component. It expects a string containing facets ids, comma separated. This property will include or exclude facets based on its value. The default value is an empty string and the component will render all existing facets.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
renderableFacets: string | undefined;
```

## Remarks

To behave as a `include`<!-- -->, simply set the facets ids, comma separated: `existingFacets=[{ brand: ... }, category: { ... }, color: { ... }, price: { ... }]` `renderableFacets="brand, category"`

The component will render brand and category facets.

On the other hand, to simulate an `exclude` behaviour and exclude a facet from being rendered, append a '!' before its id: `existingFacets=[{ brand: ... }, category: { ... }, color: { ... }, price: { ... }]` `renderableFacets="!brand,!price"`

The component will render category and color facets.
